zh.Hertford, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾賀特福德
zh.Westmill, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾維斯特米爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Champney於1527年出生在英國賀特福爾維斯特米爾時，她的父親Thomas Champney20歲，母親Johane Blythe Champney19歲。她於大約1540年與Thomas Richardson II在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1615年在她的家鄉享年88歲。

zh-hans.Hertford, Hertfordshire, England: 英国賀特福爾賀特福德
zh-hans.Westmill, Hertfordshire, England: 英国賀特福爾維斯特米爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Champney于1527年出生在英国賀特福爾維斯特米爾时，她的父亲Thomas Champney20岁，母亲Johane Blythe Champney19岁。她于大约1540年与Thomas Richardson II在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1615年在她的家乡享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Champney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Chamness  .

variants.name: Champigny
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Aurel, Calix, Jean-Pierre, Laurier, Luc, Lucien, Marcel, Mederic, Normand, Pierre.

French: habitational name from any of the various places in northern and central France named Champigny, e.g. Champigny-sur-Marne in Val-de-Marne, from a Gallo-Roman settlement name composed of the personal name Campanius + the locative suffix -acum. Compare Champney .

History: In North America, this surname was originally (also) a secondary surname or dit (‘also called’) name, borne by Jean Deslandes dit Champigny from Champigny-sur-Marne in Val-de-Marne, France, who married Élisabeth Ronceray in Boucherville, QC, in 1688. His descendants also bear altered forms of the secondary surname, such as Champney, and the surname Deslandes .

variants.name: Chamness
meanings: English (London): habitational name for someone from Champagne, from Anglo-Norman French le champeneis, Middle English champenais, champeney. The name was originally freely interchangeable with the synonymous Champion 2. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Champney was born in 1527, in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England, her father, Thomas Champney, was 20 and her mother, Johane Blythe Champney, was 19. She married Thomas Richardson II about 1540, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1615, in her hometown, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Champney est née en 1527, à Westmill, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Champney, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Johane Blythe Champney, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Richardson II environ 1540, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1615, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Champney 1527 in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Champney 20 und ihre Mutter Johane Blythe Champney 19. Sie hat um 1540 in England Thomas Richardson II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1615 im Alter von 88 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Champney è nata il nel 1527 nel Westmill, Hertfordshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Champney, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Johane Blythe Champney, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Richardson II circa 1540, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1615, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Champneyが1527年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアウエストミルで生まれた時，父Thomas Champneyは20歳，母Johane Blythe Champneyは19歳であった。約1540年にイギリスでThomas Richardson IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1615年に故郷で88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Champney(이)가 1527년 영국 허트퍼드실르 웨스트미에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Champney(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johane Blythe Champney(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1540년 영국에서 Thomas Richardson II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1615년 그녀의 고향에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Champney nasceu em 1527, em Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Champney, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Johane Blythe Champney, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Richardson II aproximadamente 1540, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1615, em sua cidade natal, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Champney родилась в 1527 г. в местности вестмилл, хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Champney было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Johane Blythe Champney, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Richardson II около 1540 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1615 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Champney nació en 1527, en Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Champney, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Johane Blythe Champney, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Thomas Richardson II aproximadamente 1540, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1615, en su pueblo, a la edad de 88 años.
